text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Summer camp was so much fun!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: The training was really intense this time around...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: But it feels like I've really improved, so I'm happy!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
If I keep this up, I'm sure I'll do great at the Japan
Cup!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, please keep things nice and strict when
we get back to the academy!
